name: Alien Harvest
short_description: Alien zombies survival game, open world survival.Game uses unreal engine 5
detailed_description:
"Know the feeling you get when you realize you were right all this time? They have called me many things; prepper, conspiracy theorist, and all. Who is dead and who is alive now huh? I prepared for this day all my life, I trained myself, I built myself a bunker and I know how to deal with the damn alien invasion.

The fact that my family is in downtown city, I can't stay in the bunker any longer. I must go out there, and find my wife and our newborn."

Mass Harvest is an open-world, survival horror game with alien parasite-infected humans, alien warriors, and their creatures. Build, craft, and struggle to survive while facing obstacles throughout your journey.
